brief: Today's news features political shifts (Darline Graham's Senate run, new UK cabinet, US-Iran tensions) and economic moves (tariffs on Canada). Research highlights include studies on AI feedback in writing and visualization tools.
news_summary: Darline Graham announces Senate run with Trump's endorsement; US launches fresh strikes on Iran amid escalating tensions; Trump imposes 50% tariff on Canadian goods.
papers_summary: Research examines AI feedback in student writing, visualization literacy in VLMs, and the rhetorical impact of ChatGPT on personal statements.

en.brief: Today's news features political shifts (Darline Graham's Senate run, new UK cabinet, US-Iran tensions) and economic moves (tariffs on Canada). Research highlights include studies on AI feedback in writing and visualization tools.
en.news_summary: Darline Graham announces Senate run with Trump's endorsement; US launches fresh strikes on Iran amid escalating tensions; Trump imposes 50% tariff on Canadian goods.
en.papers_summary: Research examines AI feedback in student writing, visualization literacy in VLMs, and the rhetorical impact of ChatGPT on personal statements.

zh.brief: 英国新首相贝安德上任，中英关系受关注；泰特兄弟在美被捕并面临英国引渡；西班牙加时赛绝杀阿根廷夺得世界杯冠军。
zh.news_summary: 贝安德就任英国首相，其中国政策引发讨论；泰特兄弟因性罪行在美被捕；西班牙世界杯夺冠但赛事争议不断；外卖骑手获文学奖、朝鲜人接触K-pop、俄罗斯人回归现金使用。

todays_image.caption: Just as an ax passes from one hand to another to continue the work, Darline Graham takes up the political tool to carry on her brother's legacy.
todays_image.source_name: National Museum of African American History and Culture
todays_image.title: American Woodmen ax owned by George W. Ross
